summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Seldaesthetic luxury aesthetic clinic app (Norwegian). All backend API tests (6/6) passed and all critical frontend flows verified including Hjem render, bottom nav, Bestill/Gavekort Timma iframes, Lojalitet stamps + QR modal, hidden admin trigger (5 taps), admin login (correct + wrong), /admin route guard, manual stamping flow, and full Offers CRUD.

issues: The Emergent dev badge (id=emergent-badge) intercepts pointer events near bottom nav on small viewports; navigation works but during automated/touch interaction at the very bottom-right of the BottomNav (Kontakt tab) clicks can be intercepted. Consider z-index adjustment or hiding badge in production. Note: this is an Emergent platform overlay, not app code.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager.

Admin auth is stateless: backend returns a token but does not verify it on subsequent admin endpoints (offers/loyalty admin actions). Anyone can call POST/PUT/DELETE /api/offers and /api/loyalty/* without the token. Recommend adding a dependency that validates Bearer token or session.
ADMIN_PASSWORD default 'selda123' is hardcoded in source as a fallback; ensure it is set via env in production deploys.

Reset endpoint increments total_completed only when stamps>=10; calling reset on a partial card silently zeros stamps without incrementing — consider rejecting reset if stamps<10 or document this behavior.
Frontend stores admin auth in sessionStorage flag 'seld_admin' = '1' (no token); guard is purely client-side, easily bypassable. Acceptable for low-stakes admin but document.
QRModal close — Escape works (verified) but no explicit close button data-testid found; consider adding one for accessibility/testing.
Admin offers list lacks pagination — fine for current scale but could degrade on large data.
seed_data_creation: Backend startup auto-seeds one offer (Hydra Skin Deluxe). Test created/deleted TEST_ prefixed loyalty cards (TEST_PW_DEV_002 left with 1 stamp) and a TEST_PW_Offer (deleted after creation).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_seldaesthetic.py — run with pytest. Frontend uses mobile viewport 414x900; the Emergent badge (#emergent-badge) overlays bottom-right and can intercept clicks on Kontakt tab — use force=True or remove via JS for reliable automation. Admin flow requires 5 quick taps on '[data-testid=admin-secret-trigger]' in footer (scroll to bottom). Stamping flow: TEST_PW_DEV_002 currently has stamps; reset before re-running 10-stamp tests or use fresh device id. Iframes for Timma (bestill + giftcard) only verified by src attribute presence (third-party content may not render in all environments).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All assertions passed.
